column.name: question_text
column.value: How often do you use your phone for longer than you originally intended?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Rarely or never

column.name: option_d
column.value: Almost always

column.name: question_text
column.value: How often do you feel restless or uncomfortable when you cannot check your phone?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Never — I feel no urge

column.name: option_d
column.value: Almost always — I feel anxious without it

column.name: question_text
column.value: How often do you use your phone within the hour before sleeping?

column.name: option_b
column.value: Occasionally, less than 30 minutes

column.name: option_c
column.value: Most nights, for 30+ minutes

column.name: option_d
column.value: Every night, for over an hour

column.name: question_text
column.value: How often do you check your phone even without receiving a notification?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Rarely — only when expecting something

column.name: option_b
column.value: A few times a day

column.name: option_c
column.value: Every hour or so

column.name: option_d
column.value: Constantly — it is almost automatic

column.name: question_text
column.value: Reading comprehension task — read the passage and answer the questions that follow.

column.name: option_a
column.value: Answered all questions correctly

column.name: option_b
column.value: Answered most questions correctly

column.name: option_c
column.value: Answered some questions correctly

column.name: option_d
column.value: Struggled to recall the passage

column.name: question_text
column.value: Working memory task — read the passage and tap each time you re-read a sentence.

column.name: option_a
column.value: Read it once with no re-reads

column.name: option_b
column.value: Re-read 1 to 2 sentences

column.name: option_c
column.value: Re-read 3 to 4 sentences

column.name: option_d
column.value: Re-read 5 or more sentences

column.name: question_text
column.value: How often do you have difficulty sustaining attention during long or repetitive tasks?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Rarely — I stay on task easily

column.name: option_b
column.value: Sometimes — I drift but recover

column.name: option_c
column.value: Often — it disrupts my work

column.name: option_d
column.value: Almost always — I can rarely stay on task

column.name: question_text
column.value: How often do you find your mind wandering when you are trying to concentrate on something?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Rarely — I can redirect focus easily

column.name: option_b
column.value: Sometimes — requires some effort

column.name: option_c
column.value: Often — it disrupts my concentration

column.name: option_d
column.value: Almost always — I struggle to stay present

column.name: question_text
column.value: After a period of scrolling or switching between apps, how hard is it to return to focused work?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Easy — I refocus almost immediately

column.name: option_b
column.value: A few minutes to settle back in

column.name: option_c
column.value: 15 to 30 minutes before I feel focused again

column.name: option_d
column.value: I struggle to regain focus for an extended period

column.name: question_text
column.value: How would you rate the quality of your sleep on most nights?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Very good — I wake up feeling refreshed

column.name: option_b
column.value: Fairly good — mostly rested

column.name: option_c
column.value: Fairly poor — I often feel tired during the day

column.name: option_d
column.value: Very poor — I rarely feel rested

column.name: question_text
column.value: How many days per week do you engage in at least 30 minutes of moderate physical activity?

column.name: option_a
column.value: 5 or more days

column.name: option_b
column.value: 3 to 4 days

column.name: option_c
column.value: 1 to 2 days

column.name: option_d
column.value: Rarely or never

column.name: question_text
column.value: How consistent is your daily schedule (wake time, meals, work hours)?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Very consistent — I follow a structured daily routine

column.name: option_b
column.value: Mostly consistent with occasional variation

column.name: option_c
column.value: Quite inconsistent — my schedule varies a lot

column.name: option_d
column.value: No real routine — each day is unpredictable

column.name: question_text
column.value: When you encounter a mentally challenging problem, what is your first reaction?

column.name: option_a
column.value: I engage with it — I enjoy the mental effort

column.name: option_b
column.value: I work through it when I need to

column.name: option_c
column.value: I prefer to find an easier approach

column.name: option_d
column.value: I avoid it and look for someone else to solve it

column.name: question_text
column.value: How well do you typically remember something new you learned a few days later?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Very well — I retain most details

column.name: option_b
column.value: Fairly well — I remember the key points

column.name: option_c
column.value: Poorly — I forget most of it quickly

column.name: option_d
column.value: Barely at all — it fades within hours

column.name: question_text
column.value: How comfortable are you spending 60+ minutes on a single task without switching?

column.name: option_a
column.value: Very comfortable — I prefer long deep work sessions

column.name: option_b
column.value: Comfortable — I can do it when needed

column.name: option_c
column.value: Uncomfortable — I feel the urge to switch after a short time

column.name: option_d
column.value: Very difficult — I regularly break off to do other things
